parameters.architecture: GQA (8 KV heads x 128 head_dim = 1024 KV dim), 36 layers

key_finding: TWO-PHASE EMERGENCE: ramp L0-L9 (signal emerges L3, 9% depth), plateau L10-L35 (mean V|nums 0.17-0.22, 19/20 bins positive). Forward-looking is DISTRIBUTED across 26 layers, not localized. At chain start (0-5%): V|nums emerges L8 (+0.10), peaks L19 (+0.32). Signal PLATEAUS rather than accumulates — established at middle layers, maintained via residual stream.
evidence_impact: Adds depth dimension to Phase 2 evidence. Two-phase (ramp+plateau) is new mechanistic finding. Supports distributed computation interpretation over localized circuit.
next_planned: Cross-model layer sweep on Phi-3.5-mini, or K layer sweep to compare K vs V depth profiles.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep on 2 families + 2 sizes. LAYER SWEEP (exp 089): two-phase emergence (ramp L0-L9, plateau L10-L35), 19/20 bins positive from L10. Forward-looking is distributed (26 layers), not localized. Per-operation probing on 2 families. WRRA on 2 families. Paraphrase NULL.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 complete (4 families). Phase 2: position-sweep STRONG on 2 families + 2 sizes, WEAK on Mistral. Layer sweep on Qwen only (cross-model layer sweep pending).
